description: Multiple unspecified vulnerabilities in Oracle Database 8.1.7.4 and 9.0.1.5 have unknown impact and attack vectors related to (1) Advanced Security Option and oklist or okdstry (DB10), (2) Oracle Net Services (DB13), and (3) Recovery Manager and oklist (DB16).
